currency.name: Spirit Points
currency.note: A synthetic community participation currency. It is separate from XP and has no cash value.

benefits.name: Post-game Sports Drink
benefits.description: A synthetic sports drink benefit for residents who complete the evening basketball Pulse.
benefits.resident_value: Turns a sports check-in into an immediate, relevant real-life reward.
benefits.operator_value: Connects sports-space activation to measurable partner conversion.
privacy_notes: Redemption history is private to the resident and authorized operator.

benefits.name: Family Workshop Priority Slot
benefits.validity_label: Valid for the next workshop release
benefits.description: Priority access to reserve one place in the next limited family workshop.
benefits.resident_value: Rewards returning families with useful access rather than another decorative badge.
benefits.operator_value: Creates a measurable bridge from family participation to future booking.
privacy_notes: Children's information is not included in the benefit record.

benefits.name: Shared-space Co-creator Vote
benefits.validity_label: Valid during the current World Keepers season
benefits.description: One synthetic vote on the next resident-visible shared-space micro-upgrade.
benefits.resident_value: Converts maintenance participation into visible agency over the community.
benefits.operator_value: Makes resident co-creation traceable without exposing individual issue history.
privacy_notes: Voting choices are private by default.
